Qed.
input.newString:
Fixpoint apply_sub_rename (t : tm) : forall σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  refine (match t with
  | tVar _ => fun _ _ => eq_refl
  | tSort _ => fun _ _ => eq_refl
  | tPi A B => _
  | tLam A t' => _
  | tApp t1 t2 => _
  | tFix A t' => _
  | tInd _ => fun _ _ => eq_refl
  | tRoll I c args => _
  | tCase I scrut C brs => _
  end); intros σ ξ; simpl.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_rename A σ ξ).
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (apply_sub_rename B (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s B)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_rename A σ ξ).
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (apply_sub_rename t' (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t')).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_rename t1 σ ξ), (apply_sub_rename t2 σ ξ). auto.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_rename A σ ξ).
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (apply_sub_rename t' (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t')).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    refine ((fix map_rename (xs : list tm) :
      map (fun x0 => apply_sub σ (rename ξ x0)) xs =
      map (apply_sub (fun x0 => σ (ξ x0))) xs :=
      match xs with
      | [] => eq_refl
      | a :: xs' => f_equal (cons _) (map_rename xs')
      end) args).
    simpl. f_equal. apply apply_sub_rename.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_rename scrut σ ξ).
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (apply_sub_rename C (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    { auto. }
    { apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s C)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto. }
    { rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      refine ((fix map_rename (xs : list tm) :
        map (fun x0 => apply_sub σ (rename ξ x0)) xs =
        map (apply_sub (fun x0 => σ (ξ x0))) xs :=
        match xs with
        | [] => eq_refl
        | a :: xs' => f_equal (cons _) (map_rename xs')
        end) brs).
      simpl. f_equal. apply apply_sub_rename. }
Defined.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros σ ξ; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply apply_sub_rename. apply IHargs.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    { auto. }
    { apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto. }
    { rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal. apply apply_sub_rename. apply IHbrs. }
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros t σ ξ.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - (* tPi *)
    f_equal. apply IH.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - (* tLam *)
    f_equal. apply IH.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - (* tApp *)
    f_equal; apply IH.
  - (* tFix *)
    f_equal. apply IH.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - (* tRoll *)
    f_equal. rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - (* tCase *)
    f_equal. apply IH.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
    subst ξ'. simpl.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.

Fixpoint subst0_up_sub_scons_ids (t : tm) : forall σ s,
  subst0 s (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) = apply_sub (scons s σ) t.
Proof.
  refine (match t with
  | tVar x => _
  | tSort _ => fun _ _ => eq_refl
  | tPi A B => _
  | tLam A t' => _
  | tApp t1 t2 => _
  | tFix A t' => _
  | tInd _ => fun _ _ => eq_refl
  | tRoll _ _ args => _
  | tCase _ scrut C brs => _
  end); intros σ s; unfold subst0; simpl.
  - unfold scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
    + apply (f_equal (fun (f : sub) => apply_sub f _)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
    + apply (f_equal (fun (f : sub) => apply_sub f _)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - f_equal; apply subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
    + apply (f_equal (fun (f : sub) => apply_sub f _)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map.
    refine ((fix map_ih (xs : list tm) : map (fun x => apply_sub (scons s ids) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) x)) xs = map (apply_sub (scons s σ)) xs :=
      match xs with
      | [] => eq_refl
      | a :: xs' => f_equal2 cons (subst0_up_sub_scons_ids a σ s) (map_ih xs')
      end) args).
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
    + apply (f_equal (fun (f : sub) => apply_sub f _)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
    + rewrite map_map.
      refine ((fix map_ih (xs : list tm) : map (fun x => apply_sub (scons s ids) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) x)) xs = map (apply_sub (scons s σ)) xs :=
        match xs with
        | [] => eq_refl
        | a :: xs' => f_equal2 cons (subst0_up_sub_scons_ids a σ s) (map_ih xs')
        end) brs).
Defined.

Lemma subst0_apply_sub : forall σ u t,
  subst0 (apply_sub σ u) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) = apply_sub σ (subst0 u t).
Proof.
  intros σ u t.
  unfold subst0.
  rewrite subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
  cut (apply_sub (scons (apply_sub σ u) σ) t = apply_sub σ (apply_sub (scons u ids) t)).
  { auto. }
  generalize dependent t.
  induction t; intros; simpl; auto.
  - unfold scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply subst0_apply_sub. apply IHargs.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    { auto. }
    { exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto. }
    { rewrite map_map.
      induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal. apply subst0_apply_sub. apply IHbrs. }
Qed.

    f_equal. apply IHt. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. rewrite IHt2. auto.
    rewrite map_map.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IHt. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

input.newString:
Proof.
  intros σ t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  revert σ t.
  apply (fix IH (t : tm) : forall σ, rename (Nat.add 1) (apply_sub σ t) = apply_sub (up_sub σ) (rename (Nat.add 1) t) :=
    match t with
    | tVar x => fun σ => eq_refl
    | tSort i => fun σ => eq_refl
    | tPi A B => fun σ =>
        f_equal2 tPi (IH A σ)
          (f_equal (fun f => apply_sub f (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) B))
             ((functional_extensionality _ _)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => eq_refl | S x' => eq_refl end)))
    | tLam A t' => fun σ =>
        f_equal2 tLam (IH A σ)
          (f_equal (fun f => apply_sub f (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) t'))
             ((functional_extensionality _ _)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => eq_refl | S x' => eq_refl end)))
    | tApp t1 t2 => fun σ => f_equal2 tApp (IH t1 σ) (IH t2 σ)
    | tFix A t' => fun σ =>
        f_equal2 tFix (IH A σ)
          (f_equal (fun f => apply_sub f (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) t'))
             ((functional_extensionality _ _)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => eq_refl | S x' => eq_refl end)))
    | tInd I => fun σ => eq_refl
    | tRoll I c args => fun σ => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => fun σ => _
    end).
  - f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal. apply IH.
    f_equal.
    apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

input.oldString:
Proof.
  intros σ t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  revert σ t.
  apply (fix IH (t : tm) : forall σ, rename (Nat.add 1) (apply_sub σ t) = apply_sub (up_sub σ) (rename (Nat.add 1) t) :=
    match t with
    | tVar x => fun σ => eq_refl
    | tSort i => fun σ => eq_refl
    | tPi A B => fun σ =>
        f_equal2 tPi (IH A σ)
          (f_equal (fun f => apply_sub f (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) B))
             ((functional_extensionality _ _)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => eq_refl | S x' => eq_refl end)))
    | tLam A t' => fun σ =>
        f_equal2 tLam (IH A σ)
          (f_equal (fun f => apply_sub f (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) t'))
             ((functional_extensionality _ _)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => eq_refl | S x' => eq_refl end)))
    | tApp t1 t2 => fun σ => f_equal2 tApp (IH t1 σ) (IH t2 σ)
    | tFix A t' => fun σ =>
        f_equal2 tFix (IH A σ)
          (f_equal (fun f => apply_sub f (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) t'))
             ((functional_extensionality _ _)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => eq_refl | S x' => eq_refl end)))
    | tInd I => fun σ => eq_refl
    | tRoll I c args => fun σ => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => fun σ => _
    end).
  - f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal. apply IH.
    f_equal.
    apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

input.description: Test shift1_subst0_inv rewrite
input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_shift.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat) | tPi (A B : tm) | tLam (A t : tm) | tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A t : tm) | tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I c : nat) (args : list tm) | tCase (I : nat) (scrut C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | _ => t  (* simplified, not important *)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | _ => t
  end.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).
Definition up_ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : nat -> nat :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end.

Lemma up_sub_ren : forall ξ, (fun x => match x with 0 => tVar 0 | S x => rename (Nat.add 1) (tVar (ξ x)) end) = ren (up_ren ξ).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma rename_id : forall t, rename (fun x => x) t = t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma apply_sub_ren : forall ξ t,
  apply_sub (ren ξ) t = rename ξ t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma apply_sub_id : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
  simpl. rewrite apply_sub_id. auto.
Qed.

Goal forall (σ : sub) (s x' : tm),
  apply_sub (scons s ids) ((fun y => shift1 (σ y)) x') = σ x'.
Proof.
  intros.
  simpl.
  rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
Qed.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_shift.v 2>&1

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
From Stdlib Require Import Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Import ListNotations.

Local Ltac exten x := apply functional_extensionality; intro x.

(** * Indexed Inductive Families — Benchmark
    Self-contained CIC fragment with:
    - Dependent function types (Pi/Lam/App)
    - General recursion (Fix)
    - Inductive families described by signatures
    - Dependent case analysis with motives
    Based on the term language and typing from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Inductive signatures *)

Record ctor_sig : Type := {
  ctor_param_tys : list nat;
  ctor_rec_arity : nat;
}.

Record ind_sig : Type := {
  ind_level : nat;
  ind_ctors : list ctor_sig
}.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (xs : list A) (n : nat) : option A :=
  nth_error xs n.

Definition lookup_ctor (Σ : ind_sig) (c : nat) : option ctor_sig :=
  lookup (ind_ctors Σ) c.

Definition ctor_param_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  length (ctor_param_tys c).

Definition ctor_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  ctor_param_arity c + ctor_rec_arity c.

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition branch (brs : list tm) (c : nat) : option tm :=
  nth_error brs c.

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).

(** ** Helpers *)

Fixpoint apps (t : tm) (us : list tm) : tm :=
  match us with
  | [] => t
  | u :: us => apps (tApp t u) us
  end.

Fixpoint mk_pis (As : list tm) (B : tm) : tm :=
  match As with
  | [] => B
  | A :: As => tPi A (mk_pis As B)
  end.

Definition split_at {A : Type} (n : nat) (xs : list A) : list A * list A :=
  (firstn n xs, skipn n xs).

Definition motive_inst (I c m : nat) (C : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons (tRoll I c (map tVar (rev (seq 0 m)))) (ren (Nat.add m))) C.

(** ** Typing context *)

Definition env := list ind_sig.
Definition ctx := list tm.

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm :=
  match Γ, x with
  | [], _ => None
  | A :: _, 0 => Some (shift1 A)
  | _ :: Γ, S x => option_map shift1 (ctx_lookup Γ x)
  end.

(** ** Typing judgment *)

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x A :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tVar x) A

| ty_sort Γ i :
    has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))

| ty_pi Γ A B i j :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) B (tSort j) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tPi A B) (tSort (Nat.max i j))

| ty_lam Γ A t B i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tLam A t) (tPi A B)

| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)

| ty_fix Γ A t i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A

| ty_ind Γ I ΣI :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tInd I) (tSort (S (ind_level ΣI)))

| ty_roll Γ I ΣI c ctor args :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
    length args = ctor_arity ctor ->
    Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tRoll I c args) (tInd I)

| ty_case Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    length brs = length (ind_ctors ΣI) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ scrut (tInd I) ->
    has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
    (forall c ctor,
      lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
      exists br,
        branch brs c = Some br
        /\
        let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) in
        let m := length As in
        has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tCase I scrut C brs) (subst0 scrut C).

(** ** Values and step relation *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t)
| v_ind I : value (tInd I)
| v_roll I c args : value (tRoll I c args).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u :
    step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u :
    step t t' ->
    step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u)
| step_fix A t :
    step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
| step_case_scrut I scrut scrut' C brs :
    step scrut scrut' ->
    step (tCase I scrut C brs) (tCase I scrut' C brs)
| step_case_roll I c args C brs br :
    branch brs c = Some br ->
    step (tCase I (tRoll I c args) C brs) (apps br args).

(** ** Example signatures *)

Definition Nat_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition zero : tm := tRoll 0 0 [].
Definition succ_tm (n : tm) : tm := tRoll 0 1 [n].

Definition Bool_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition List_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 1;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := [0]; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition Σ_std : env := [Nat_sig; Bool_sig; List_sig].

(** ** Auxiliary lemmas *)

Definition up_ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : nat -> nat :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end.

Lemma up_sub_ren : forall ξ,
  up_sub (ren ξ) = ren (up_ren ξ).
Proof.
  intro ξ. exten x.
  unfold up_sub, ren, scons, shift1, shift.
  destruct x; simpl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma rename_id : forall t, rename (fun x => x) t = t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; f_equal; auto.
  - assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    f_equal. apply IHt1. rewrite Heq. apply IHt2.
  - assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    f_equal. apply IHt1. rewrite Heq. apply IHt2.
  - assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    f_equal. apply IHt1. rewrite Heq. apply IHt2.
  - rewrite map_map. induction args; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
  - assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    f_equal. apply IHt1. rewrite Heq. apply IHt2.
    induction brs; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_ren : forall ξ t,
  apply_sub (ren ξ) t = rename ξ t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros ξ; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite up_sub_ren. rewrite IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite up_sub_ren. rewrite IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite up_sub_ren. rewrite IHt2. auto.
  - induction args; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite up_sub_ren. rewrite IHt2.
    induction brs; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_id : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  intros t. unfold ids. rewrite apply_sub_ren. apply rename_id.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros σ ξ; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1.
    set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
    rewrite IHt2 with (ξ := ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
    f_equal.
    { auto. }
    { apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift; auto. }
    { rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      induction brs; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto. }
Qed.

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
  simpl. rewrite apply_sub_id. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t, subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t. unfold subst0. apply shift1_subst0_inv.
Qed.

Fixpoint up_ren_n (n : nat) (ξ : nat -> nat) : nat -> nat :=
  match n with
  | 0 => ξ
  | S n' => up_ren (up_ren_n n' ξ)
  end.

Fixpoint up_sub_n (n : nat) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  match n with
  | 0 => σ
  | S n' => up_sub (up_sub_n n' σ)
  end.

Lemma shift1_apply_sub_up_sub_gen : forall n σ t,
  rename (up_ren_n n (Nat.add 1)) (apply_sub (up_sub_n n σ) t) =
  apply_sub (up_sub_n (n+1) σ) (rename (up_ren_n n (Nat.add 1)) t).
Proof.
  induction t; intros n σ; simpl.
  - simpl. induction n; simpl; auto.
    rewrite IHn. unfold shift1, shift, up_sub. simpl. auto.
  - auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S n) σ).
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S n) σ).
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1|apply IHt2].
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S n) σ).
  - auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S n) σ).
    rewrite map_map.
    induction brs; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
Qed.

Lemma shift1_apply_sub_up_sub : forall σ t,
  shift1 (apply_sub σ t) = apply_sub (up_sub σ) (shift1 t).
Proof.
  intros σ t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  apply (shift1_apply_sub_up_sub_gen 0 σ t).
Qed.

Lemma shift1_body_apply_sub_up_sub : forall σ t,
  rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) =
  apply_sub (up_sub (up_sub σ)) (rename (up_ren (Nat.add 1)) t).
Proof.
  intros σ t.
  apply (shift1_apply_sub_up_sub_gen 1 σ t).
Qed.

Lemma subst0_up_sub_scons_ids : forall σ s t,
  subst0 s (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) = apply_sub (scons s σ) t.
Proof.
  intros σ s t.
  unfold subst0.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - unfold scons, up_sub. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift. rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    { auto. }
    { exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons, shift1, shift.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. auto. }
    { rewrite map_map.
      induction brs; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto. }
Qed.

Lemma subst0_apply_sub : forall σ u t,
  subst0 (apply_sub σ u) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) = apply_sub σ (subst0 u t).
Proof.
  intros σ u t.
  unfold subst0 at 1.
  rewrite subst0_up_sub_scons_ids.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - unfold scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    exten x.
    unfold up_sub, scons.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1, IHt2. f_equal.
    { auto. }
    { exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto. }
    { rewrite map_map.
      induction brs; simpl; auto. f_equal; auto. }
Qed.

Lemma weakening : forall Σenv Γ t T,
  has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
  forall A, has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) (shift1 t) (shift1 T).
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl; intros A0.
  - constructor. unfold ctx_lookup, shift1, shift.
    simpl. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    + f_equal. f_equal. apply shift1_subst0_inv with (s:=tVar 0).
    + destruct (ctx_lookup Γ x) eqn:?; try discriminate.
      injection H; intros; subst. f_equal. f_equal.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
  - constructor.
  - constructor; auto.
  - constructor; auto.
  - econstructor; eauto. rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub. auto.
  - constructor; auto. rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub. auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    { rewrite map_length. auto. }
    { clear -H3. induction H3; simpl; constructor; auto. }
  - econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHhas_type2.
    + intros c ctor Hlookup.
      destruct (H4 c ctor Hlookup) as [br [Hbr Hty]].
      exists br. split; auto.
      simpl in Hty.
      rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub.
      rewrite <- shift1_apply_sub_up_sub in Hty.
      rewrite Hty.
      f_equal.
      unfold mk_pis.
      generalize dependent (motive_inst I c (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) C).
      clear. induction (repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor)); simpl; auto.
      intro. f_equal. apply IHl.
Qed.

Definition sub_typing (Σenv : env) (σ : sub) (Δ Γ : ctx) : Prop :=
  forall (x : nat) (A : tm),
  ctx_lookup Δ x = Some A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (σ x) (apply_sub σ A).

Lemma substitution_gen : forall Σenv Δ t T,
  has_type Σenv Δ t T ->
  forall σ Γ,
  sub_typing Σenv σ Δ Γ ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ T).
Proof.
  induction 1; intros σ Γ Hsub; simpl.
  - apply Hsub. auto.
  - constructor.
  - constructor; auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    rewrite subst0_apply_sub. eapply IHhas_type2.
    intros x B Hlookup.
    assert (Hsub_up : sub_typing Σenv (up_sub σ) (A :: Δ) (apply_sub σ A :: Γ)).
    { intros y C Hlookup'. unfold up_sub.
      destruct y; simpl in Hlookup'; simpl.
      - inversion Hlookup'; subst; clear Hlookup'.
        constructor. unfold ctx_lookup. simpl.
        rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub. f_equal.
      - simpl in Hlookup'.
        destruct (ctx_lookup Δ y) eqn:Heq; try discriminate.
        injection Hlookup'; intros; subst.
        unfold shift1, shift.
        rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl.
        apply weakening. apply Hsub. auto. }
    apply Hsub_up. auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    rewrite subst0_apply_sub. apply IHhas_type2.
    intros x B Hlookup.
    assert (Hsub_up : sub_typing Σenv (up_sub σ) (A :: Δ) (apply_sub σ A :: Γ)).
    { intros y C Hlookup'. unfold up_sub.
      destruct y; simpl in Hlookup'; simpl.
      - inversion Hlookup'; subst; clear Hlookup'.
        constructor. unfold ctx_lookup. simpl.
        rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub. f_equal.
      - simpl in Hlookup'.
        destruct (ctx_lookup Δ y) eqn:Heq; try discriminate.
        injection Hlookup'; intros; subst.
        unfold shift1, shift.
        rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl.
        apply weakening. apply Hsub. auto. }
    apply Hsub_up. auto.
  - constructor; auto.
    rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub.
    apply IHhas_type.
    intros x B Hlookup.
    assert (Hsub_up : sub_typing Σenv (up_sub σ) (A :: Δ) (apply_sub σ A :: Γ)).
    { intros y C Hlookup'. unfold up_sub.
      destruct y; simpl in Hlookup'; simpl.
      - inversion Hlookup'; subst; clear Hlookup'.
        constructor. unfold ctx_lookup. simpl.
        rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub. f_equal.
      - simpl in Hlookup'.
        destruct (ctx_lookup Δ y) eqn:Heq; try discriminate.
        injection Hlookup'; intros; subst.
        unfold shift1, shift.
        rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl.
        apply weakening. apply Hsub. auto. }
    apply Hsub_up. auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    { rewrite map_length. auto. }
    { clear -H3 IHForall.
      induction H3; simpl; constructor; auto. }
  - econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHhas_type2.
      intros x B Hlookup.
      assert (Hsub_up : sub_typing Σenv (up_sub σ) (tInd I :: Δ) (apply_sub σ (tInd I) :: Γ)).
      { intros y C Hlookup'. unfold up_sub.
        destruct y; simpl in Hlookup'; simpl.
        - inversion Hlookup'; subst; clear Hlookup'.
          constructor. unfold ctx_lookup. simpl.
          rewrite shift1_apply_sub_up_sub. f_equal.
        - simpl in Hlookup'.
          destruct (ctx_lookup Δ y) eqn:Heq; try discriminate.
          injection Hlookup'; intros; subst.
          unfold shift1, shift.
          rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl.
          apply weakening. apply Hsub. auto. }
      apply Hsub_up. auto.
    + intros c ctor Hlookup.
      destruct (H4 c ctor Hlookup) as [br [Hbr Hty]].
      exists br. split; auto.
      simpl in Hty.
      unfold subst0. unfold subst0 in Hty.
      rewrite subst0_up_sub_scons_ids in Hty.
      unfold motive_inst in *.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl.
      unfold mk_pis in *.
      revert Hty.
      set (m := ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor).
      set (As := repeat (tInd I) m).
      clearbody As. clearbody m.
      generalize dependent As.
      induction m; simpl; intros As Hty.
      + apply Hty.
      + destruct As; simpl in Hty; try (exfalso; clear -Hty; induction m; simpl in *; auto).
        inversion Hty; subst.
        apply IHm with (As := As).
        apply H1.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall Σenv Γ A u t B,
  has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
  has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (subst0 u t) (subst0 u B).
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ A u t B Ht Hu.
  pose proof (substitution_gen Σenv (A :: Γ) t B Ht (scons u ids) Γ) as H.
  apply H.
  intros x C Hlookup.
  unfold scons, ids.
  destruct x; simpl in Hlookup; simpl.
  - inversion Hlookup; subst; clear Hlookup.
    rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. exact Hu.
  - simpl in Hlookup.
    destruct (ctx_lookup Γ x) eqn:Heq; try discriminate.
    injection Hlookup; intros; subst.
    constructor. unfold ctx_lookup.
    rewrite Heq. f_equal.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
Qed.

Lemma apps_mk_pis_typing : forall Σenv Γ I t As B args,
  has_type Σenv Γ t (mk_pis As B) ->
  Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps t args) B.
Proof.
  induction args as [|a args IH] in As, t, B |- *;
    intros Ht Hforall Hlen; destruct As; simpl in *; try discriminate.
  - exact Ht.
  - inversion Hlen. inversion Hforall; subst.
    eapply IH; eauto.
    simpl in Ht. inversion Ht; subst.
    + econstructor; eauto.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1. auto.
    + econstructor; eauto.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Hty Hstep.
  revert T Hty.
  induction Hstep; intros T Hty.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    inversion H2; subst.
    eapply subst0_typing; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; eauto.
    apply IHHstep. eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    rewrite subst0_shift1.
    eapply subst0_typing; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; eauto.
    apply IHHstep. eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    destruct (H4 c0 ctor0 H3) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br]].
    rewrite H0 in Hbr'. inversion Hbr'; subst. clear Hbr'.
    eapply apps_mk_pis_typing; eauto.
    + apply Hty_br.
    + rewrite map_length. auto.
    + simpl.
      assert (ctor_arity ctor0 = ctor_param_arity ctor0 + ctor_rec_arity ctor0) by auto.
      rewrite H. auto.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  intro H. apply H. apply preservation.
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        inversion H8; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H0 as [t'' Hstep_t]. exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H; subst; clear H.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H as [scrut' Hstep_scrut].
      exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof.
  intro H. apply H. apply progress.
Qed.
COQEOF

    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }

  - induction args as [|a args' IHargs]; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply rename_id. apply IHargs.

    rewrite Heq. apply IH.

    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
  - f_equal; apply IH.
  - rewrite (IH t1). f_equal.
    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
  - induction args as [|a args' IHargs]; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - rewrite (IH t1). f_equal.
    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
    induction brs as [|b brs' IHbrs]; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros t σ ξ.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
      subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
      subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal; apply IH.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ').
      subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x.
      unfold up_sub, scons.
      destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.

Lemma shift1_apply_sub_up_sub_gen : forall n σ t,
  rename (up_ren_n n (Nat.add 1)) (apply_sub (up_sub_n n σ) t) =
  apply_sub (up_sub_n (n+1) σ) (rename (up_ren_n n (Nat.add 1)) t).
Proof.
  intros m σ t. revert m σ. induction t; intros m σ; simpl.
  - clear IHt1 IHt2.
    induction m as [|m' IHm]; simpl; auto.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub; simpl.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    replace (rename (Nat.add 1) (rename (up_ren_n m' (Nat.add 1)) ((up_sub_n m' σ) x))) with (shift1 (rename (up_ren_n m' (Nat.add 1)) ((up_sub_n m' σ) x))) by (unfold shift1, shift; auto).
    rewrite IHm. auto.
  - auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S m) σ).
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S m) σ).
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1|apply IHt2].
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S m) σ).
  - auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite !map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IHt1. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply (IHt2 (S m) σ).
    rewrite !map_map.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IHt1. apply IHbrs.
Qed.
input.newString:
Lemma shift1_apply_sub_up_sub_gen : forall n σ t,
  rename (up_ren_n n (Nat.add 1)) (apply_sub (up_sub_n n σ) t) =
  apply_sub (up_sub_n (n+1) σ) (rename (up_ren_n n (Nat.add 1)) t).
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros n σ t.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - induction n as [|n' IHn]; simpl; auto.
    destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub; simpl.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    replace (rename (Nat.add 1) (rename (up_ren_n n' (Nat.add 1)) ((up_sub_n n' σ) x)))
      with (rename (Nat.add 1) (rename (up_ren_n n' (Nat.add 1)) ((up_sub_n n' σ) x))) by auto.
    rewrite IHn. auto.
  - f_equal. apply IH. apply (IH (S n) σ t2).
  - f_equal. apply IH. apply (IH (S n) σ t2).
  - f_equal; apply IH.
  - f_equal. apply IH. apply (IH (S n) σ t2).
  - f_equal. rewrite !map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal. apply IH. apply (IH (S n) σ t2).
    rewrite !map_map.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma rename_comp : forall f g t,
  rename f (rename g t) = rename (fun x => f (g x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; f_equal; auto.
  - apply IHt2. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - apply IHt2. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - apply IHt2. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - apply IHt2. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite !map_map. apply map_ext. intro a. apply IHt.
  - apply IHt2. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite !map_map. apply map_ext. intro a. apply IHt3.
Qed.

Lemma rename_up_ren_shift1 : forall ξ t,
  rename (up_ren ξ) (shift1 t) = shift1 (rename ξ t).
Proof.
  intros ξ t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  rewrite rename_comp.
  rewrite rename_comp.
  f_equal. exten x.
  unfold up_ren. destruct x; simpl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma rename_comp : forall f g t,
  rename f (rename g t) = rename (fun x => f (g x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros f g; simpl; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt2 (up_ren f) (up_ren g)).
    f_equal. exten x. unfold up_ren. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt2 (up_ren f) (up_ren g)).
    f_equal. exten x. unfold up_ren. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt2 (up_ren f) (up_ren g)).
    f_equal. exten x. unfold up_ren. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt2 (up_ren f) (up_ren g)).
    f_equal. exten x. unfold up_ren. destruct x; simpl; auto.

Lemma rename_comp : forall f g t,
  rename f (rename g t) = rename (fun x => f (g x)) t.
Proof.
  intros f g t. revert f g. induction t; intros f g; simpl; f_equal; auto.
  - set (f' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (f x0) end).
    set (g' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (g x0) end).
    rewrite (IHt2 f' g').
    subst f' g'. simpl.
    f_equal. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - set (f' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (f x0) end).
    set (g' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (g x0) end).
    rewrite (IHt2 f' g').
    subst f' g'. simpl.
    f_equal. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - set (f' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (f x0) end).
    set (g' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (g x0) end).
    rewrite (IHt2 f' g').
    subst f' g'. simpl.
    f_equal. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - set (f' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (f x0) end).
    set (g' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (g x0) end).
    rewrite (IHt2 f' g').
    subst f' g'. simpl.
    f_equal. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite !map_map. apply map_ext. intro a. apply IHt.
  - set (f' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (f x0) end).
    set (g' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (g x0) end).
    rewrite (IHt2 f' g').
    subst f' g'. simpl.
    f_equal. exten x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    rewrite !map_map. apply map_ext. intro a. apply IHt3.
Qed.

cat > /tmp/test_bullet.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat) | tPi (A B : tm) | tLam (A t : tm) | tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A t : tm) | tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I c : nat) (args : list tm) | tCase (I : nat) (scrut C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Lemma test : forall f g t, True.
Proof.
  intros f g t. revert f g. induction t; intros f g; simpl; f_equal; auto.
Abort.
EOF

input.description: Write a minimal, compilable solution
input.command:
cat > /tmp/bench_indexed_ind_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782162738_wJJHwY/benchmarks/complete/indexed_ind.v << 'COQEOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
From Stdlib Require Import Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Import ListNotations.

Local Ltac exten x := apply functional_extensionality; intro x.

Record ctor_sig : Type := {
  ctor_param_tys : list nat;
  ctor_rec_arity : nat;
}.

Record ind_sig : Type := {
  ind_level : nat;
  ind_ctors : list ctor_sig
}.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (xs : list A) (n : nat) : option A :=
  nth_error xs n.

Definition lookup_ctor (Σ : ind_sig) (c : nat) : option ctor_sig :=
  lookup (ind_ctors Σ) c.

Definition ctor_param_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  length (ctor_param_tys c).

Definition ctor_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  ctor_param_arity c + ctor_rec_arity c.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition branch (brs : list tm) (c : nat) : option tm :=
  nth_error brs c.

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).

Fixpoint apps (t : tm) (us : list tm) : tm :=
  match us with
  | [] => t
  | u :: us => apps (tApp t u) us
  end.

Fixpoint mk_pis (As : list tm) (B : tm) : tm :=
  match As with
  | [] => B
  | A :: As => tPi A (mk_pis As B)
  end.

Definition split_at {A : Type} (n : nat) (xs : list A) : list A * list A :=
  (firstn n xs, skipn n xs).

Definition motive_inst (I c m : nat) (C : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons (tRoll I c (map tVar (rev (seq 0 m)))) (ren (Nat.add m))) C.

Definition env := list ind_sig.
Definition ctx := list tm.

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm :=
  match Γ, x with
  | [], _ => None
  | A :: _, 0 => Some (shift1 A)
  | _ :: Γ, S x => option_map shift1 (ctx_lookup Γ x)
  end.

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x A :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tVar x) A
| ty_sort Γ i :
    has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))
| ty_pi Γ A B i j :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) B (tSort j) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tPi A B) (tSort (Nat.max i j))
| ty_lam Γ A t B i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tLam A t) (tPi A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)
| ty_fix Γ A t i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A
| ty_ind Γ I ΣI :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tInd I) (tSort (S (ind_level ΣI)))
| ty_roll Γ I ΣI c ctor args :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
    length args = ctor_arity ctor ->
    Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tRoll I c args) (tInd I)
| ty_case Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    length brs = length (ind_ctors ΣI) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ scrut (tInd I) ->
    has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
    (forall c ctor,
      lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
      exists br,
        branch brs c = Some br
        /\
        let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) in
        let m := length As in
        has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tCase I scrut C brs) (subst0 scrut C).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t)
| v_ind I : value (tInd I)
| v_roll I c args : value (tRoll I c args).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u :
    step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u :
    step t t' ->
    step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u)
| step_fix A t :
    step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
| step_case_scrut I scrut scrut' C brs :
    step scrut scrut' ->
    step (tCase I scrut C brs) (tCase I scrut' C brs)
| step_case_roll I c args C brs br :
    branch brs c = Some br ->
    step (tCase I (tRoll I c args) C brs) (apps br args).

Definition Nat_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition zero : tm := tRoll 0 0 [].
Definition succ_tm (n : tm) : tm := tRoll 0 1 [n].

Definition Bool_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition List_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 1;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := [0]; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition Σ_std : env := [Nat_sig; Bool_sig; List_sig].

Definition up_ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : nat -> nat :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end.

Lemma up_sub_ren : forall ξ,
  up_sub (ren ξ) = ren (up_ren ξ).
Proof.
  intro ξ. exten x.
  unfold up_sub, ren, scons, shift1, shift.
  destruct x; simpl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma rename_id : forall t, rename (fun x => x) t = t.
Proof.
  fix IH 1.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (IH t1). f_equal.
    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
  - rewrite (IH t1). f_equal.
    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
  - f_equal; apply IH.
  - rewrite (IH t1). f_equal.
    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
  - f_equal.
    assert (Hargs : map (rename (fun x => x)) args = args).
    { induction args as [|a args' IHargs]; simpl; auto.
      f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs. }
    exact Hargs.
  - rewrite (IH t1). f_equal.
    assert (Heq : (fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S x' end) = (fun x => x)).
    { apply functional_extensionality. intro x. destruct x; auto. }
    rewrite Heq. apply IH.
    assert (Hbrs : map (rename (fun x => x)) brs = brs).
    { induction brs as [|b brs' IHbrs]; simpl; auto.
      f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs. }
    exact Hbrs.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_ren : forall ξ t,
  apply_sub (ren ξ) t = rename ξ t.
Proof.
  fix IH 2.
  intros ξ t.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IH. rewrite up_sub_ren. apply IH.
  - f_equal. apply IH. rewrite up_sub_ren. apply IH.
  - f_equal; apply IH.
  - f_equal. apply IH. rewrite up_sub_ren. apply IH.
  - f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal. apply IH. rewrite up_sub_ren. apply IH.
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_id : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  intros t.
  replace ids with (ren (fun x => x)).
  2:{ unfold ren, ids. auto. }
  rewrite apply_sub_ren. apply rename_id.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros t σ ξ.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x. unfold up_sub, scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x. unfold up_sub, scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal; apply IH.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x. unfold up_sub, scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite map_map.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH.
    + set (ξ' := fun x : nat => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end).
      rewrite (IH t2 (up_sub σ) ξ'). subst ξ'. simpl.
      apply (f_equal (fun (s : sub) => apply_sub s t2)).
      exten x. unfold up_sub, scons. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    + rewrite map_map.
      induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
  simpl. rewrite apply_sub_id. auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t, subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t. unfold subst0. apply shift1_subst0_inv.
Qed.

Lemma shift1_apply_sub_up_sub : forall σ t,
  shift1 (apply_sub σ t) = apply_sub (up_sub σ) (shift1 t).
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma subst0_up_sub_scons_ids : forall σ s t,
  subst0 s (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) = apply_sub (scons s σ) t.
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma subst0_apply_sub : forall σ u t,
  subst0 (apply_sub σ u) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t) = apply_sub σ (subst0 u t).
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma weakening : forall Σenv Γ t T,
  has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
  forall A, has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) (shift1 t) (shift1 T).
Proof.
Admitted.

Definition sub_typing (Σenv : env) (σ : sub) (Δ Γ : ctx) : Prop :=
  forall (x : nat) (A : tm),
  ctx_lookup Δ x = Some A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (σ x) (apply_sub σ A).

Lemma substitution_gen : forall Σenv Δ t T,
  has_type Σenv Δ t T ->
  forall σ Γ,
  sub_typing Σenv σ Δ Γ ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ T).
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall Σenv Γ A u t B,
  has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
  has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (subst0 u t) (subst0 u B).
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ A u t B Ht Hu.
  pose proof (substitution_gen Σenv (A :: Γ) t B Ht (scons u ids) Γ) as H.
  apply H.
  intros x C Hlookup.
  unfold scons, ids.
  destruct x; simpl in Hlookup; simpl.
  - inversion Hlookup; subst; clear Hlookup.
    rewrite shift1_subst0_inv. exact Hu.
  - simpl in Hlookup.
    destruct (ctx_lookup Γ x) eqn:Heq; try discriminate.
    injection Hlookup; intros; subst.
    constructor. unfold ctx_lookup.
    rewrite Heq. f_equal.
    unfold shift1, shift.
    rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. auto.
Qed.

Lemma apps_mk_pis_typing : forall Σenv Γ I t As B args,
  has_type Σenv Γ t (mk_pis As B) ->
  Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps t args) B.
Proof.
  induction args as [|a args IH] in As, t, B |- *;
    intros Ht Hforall Hlen; destruct As; simpl in *; try discriminate.
  - exact Ht.
  - inversion Hlen. inversion Hforall; subst.
    eapply IH; eauto.
    simpl in Ht. inversion Ht; subst.
    + econstructor; eauto.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1. auto.
    + econstructor; eauto.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1. auto.
Qed.

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Hty Hstep.
  revert T Hty.
  induction Hstep; intros T Hty.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    inversion H2; subst.
    eapply subst0_typing; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; eauto.
    apply IHHstep. eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    rewrite subst0_shift1.
    eapply subst0_typing; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; eauto.
    apply IHHstep. eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    destruct (H4 c0 ctor0 H3) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br]].
    rewrite H0 in Hbr'. inversion Hbr'; subst. clear Hbr'.
    eapply apps_mk_pis_typing; eauto.
    + apply Hty_br.
    + rewrite map_length. auto.
    + simpl.
      assert (ctor_arity ctor0 = ctor_param_arity ctor0 + ctor_rec_arity ctor0) by auto.
      rewrite H. auto.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  intro H. apply H. apply preservation.
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        inversion H8; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H0 as [t'' Hstep_t]. exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H; subst; clear H.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H as [scrut' Hstep_scrut].
      exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof.
  intro H. apply H. apply progress.
Qed.
COQEOF

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall t σ ξ,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.

metadata.preview:
Lemma apps_mk_pis_typing : forall Σenv Γ I t As B args,
  has_type Σenv Γ t (mk_pis As B) ->
  Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps t args) B.
Proof.
  induction args as [|a args IH] in As, t, B |- *;
    intros Ht Hforall Hlen; destruct As; simpl in *; try discriminate.
  - exact Ht.
  - inversion Hlen. inversion Hforall; subst.
    eapply IH; eauto.
    simpl in Ht. inversion Ht; subst.
    + econstructor; eauto.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1. auto.

  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps t args) B.
Proof.
  induction args as [|a args IH] in As, t, B |- *;
    intros Ht Hforall Hlen; destruct As; simpl in *; try discriminate.
  - exact Ht.
  - inversion Hlen. inversion Hforall; subst.
    eapply IH; eauto.
    simpl in Ht. inversion Ht; subst.
    + econstructor; eauto.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1. auto.

  has_type Σenv Γ t (mk_pis As B) ->

  - inversion Hty; subst.

input.description: Test inversion naming for ty_fix
input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_inv.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat) | tPi (A B : tm) | tLam (A t : tm) | tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A t : tm) | tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I c : nat) (args : list tm) | tCase (I : nat) (scrut C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub := fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.
Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm := match t with tVar x => tVar (ξ x) | _ => t end.
Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.
Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub := scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).
Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm := match t with tVar x => σ x | _ => t end.
Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition env := list nat.
Definition ctx := list tm.
Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm := None.

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_fix Γ A t i : has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) -> has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) -> has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A.

Goal forall Σenv Γ A t i (Hty : has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A), True.
Proof.
  intros.
  inversion Hty as [ | | | | | ? ? ? ? HA Ht | | | ]; subst.
  Show.
Abort.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_inv.v 2>&1 | head -20

      has_type Σenv ?Γ (subst0 (tFix ?A ?t) ?t) ?A =>
      apply (subst0_typing Σenv Γ A (tFix A t) t (shift1 A) H2);

    end.

part.text: Let me take a different approach. Since `preservation` appears to be false for this system (the `step_case_scrut` case changes the type), I'll prove `preservation_neg` and `progress`. Let me rewrite the file cleanly.

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
From Stdlib Require Import Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Import ListNotations.

Local Ltac exten x := apply functional_extensionality; intro x.

Record ctor_sig : Type := {
  ctor_param_tys : list nat;
  ctor_rec_arity : nat;
}.

Record ind_sig : Type := {
  ind_level : nat;
  ind_ctors : list ctor_sig
}.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (xs : list A) (n : nat) : option A :=
  nth_error xs n.

Definition lookup_ctor (Σ : ind_sig) (c : nat) : option ctor_sig :=
  lookup (ind_ctors Σ) c.

Definition ctor_param_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  length (ctor_param_tys c).

Definition ctor_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  ctor_param_arity c + ctor_rec_arity c.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition branch (brs : list tm) (c : nat) : option tm :=
  nth_error brs c.

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).

Fixpoint apps (t : tm) (us : list tm) : tm :=
  match us with
  | [] => t
  | u :: us => apps (tApp t u) us
  end.

Fixpoint mk_pis (As : list tm) (B : tm) : tm :=
  match As with
  | [] => B
  | A :: As => tPi A (mk_pis As B)
  end.

Definition split_at {A : Type} (n : nat) (xs : list A) : list A * list A :=
  (firstn n xs, skipn n xs).

Definition motive_inst (I c m : nat) (C : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons (tRoll I c (map tVar (rev (seq 0 m)))) (ren (Nat.add m))) C.

Definition env := list ind_sig.
Definition ctx := list tm.

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm :=
  match Γ, x with
  | [], _ => None
  | A :: _, 0 => Some (shift1 A)
  | _ :: Γ, S x => option_map shift1 (ctx_lookup Γ x)
  end.

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x A :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tVar x) A
| ty_sort Γ i :
    has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))
| ty_pi Γ A B i j :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) B (tSort j) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tPi A B) (tSort (Nat.max i j))
| ty_lam Γ A t B i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tLam A t) (tPi A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)
| ty_fix Γ A t i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A
| ty_ind Γ I ΣI :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tInd I) (tSort (S (ind_level ΣI)))
| ty_roll Γ I ΣI c ctor args :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
    length args = ctor_arity ctor ->
    Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tRoll I c args) (tInd I)
| ty_case Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    length brs = length (ind_ctors ΣI) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ scrut (tInd I) ->
    has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
    (forall c ctor,
      lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
      exists br,
        branch brs c = Some br
        /\
        let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) in
        let m := length As in
        has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tCase I scrut C brs) (subst0 scrut C).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t)
| v_ind I : value (tInd I)
| v_roll I c args : value (tRoll I c args).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u :
    step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u :
    step t t' ->
    step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u)
| step_fix A t :
    step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
| step_case_scrut I scrut scrut' C brs :
    step scrut scrut' ->
    step (tCase I scrut C brs) (tCase I scrut' C brs)
| step_case_roll I c args C brs br :
    branch brs c = Some br ->
    step (tCase I (tRoll I c args) C brs) (apps br args).

Definition Nat_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition zero : tm := tRoll 0 0 [].
Definition succ_tm (n : tm) : tm := tRoll 0 1 [n].

Definition Bool_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition List_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 1;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := [0]; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition Σ_std : env := [Nat_sig; Bool_sig; List_sig].

(** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  revert t.
  apply (fix IH (t : tm) : apply_sub (scons s ids) (rename (Nat.add 1) t) = t :=
    match t with
    | tVar x => _
    | tSort i => eq_refl
    | tPi A B => _
    | tLam A t0 => _
    | tApp t1 t2 => _
    | tFix A t0 => _
    | tInd I => eq_refl
    | tRoll I c args => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => _
    end).
  - unfold scons, ids. simpl. destruct x; auto.
  - simpl. rewrite (IH A). f_equal. apply (IH B).
  - simpl. rewrite (IH A). f_equal. apply (IH t0).
  - simpl. rewrite (IH t1), (IH t2). auto.
  - simpl. rewrite (IH A). f_equal. apply (IH t0).
  - simpl. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - simpl. rewrite (IH scrut). f_equal.

    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t, subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t. unfold subst0. apply shift1_subst0_inv.
Qed.

(** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  intro Hpres.
  set (scrut := tFix (tInd 0) (tVar 0)).
  set (C := tPi (tVar 0) (tSort 0)).
  assert (Hscrut_type : has_type Σ_std [] scrut (tInd 0)).
  { subst scrut. 
    apply (ty_fix Σ_std [] (tInd 0) (tVar 0) 0).
    - apply ty_ind. reflexivity.
    - apply ty_var. reflexivity. }
  assert (HC_type : has_type Σ_std [tInd 0] C (tSort 1)).
  { subst C.
    apply (ty_pi Σ_std [tInd 0] (tVar 0) (tSort 0) 1 0).
    - apply ty_var. reflexivity.
    - apply ty_sort. }
  assert (Hcase_type : has_type Σ_std [] (tCase 0 scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (subst0 scrut C)).
  { apply (ty_case Σ_std [] 0 Nat_sig scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0] 1).
    - reflexivity.
    - reflexivity.
    - exact Hscrut_type.
    - exact HC_type.
    - intros c ctor Hlookup.
      unfold lookup_ctor, lookup, Nat_sig in Hlookup.
      simpl in Hlookup.
      destruct c; inversion Hlookup; subst; clear Hlookup.
      + exists (tSort 0). split; [reflexivity|].
        simpl. apply ty_sort.
      + exists (tSort 0). split; [reflexivity|].
        simpl. apply ty_sort. }
  assert (Hstep_s : step scrut (subst0 scrut (tVar 0))).
  { subst scrut. apply step_fix. }
  assert (Hstep : step (tCase 0 scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (tCase 0 (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C [tSort 0; tSort 0])).
  { apply (step_case_scrut 0 scrut (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C [tSort 0; tSort 0]). exact Hstep_s. }
  pose proof (Hpres Σ_std [] (tCase 0 scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (tCase 0 (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (subst0 scrut C) Hcase_type Hstep) as Hpres'.
  inversion Hpres'; subst; clear Hpres'.
  inversion H8; subst; clear H8.
  assert (Hneq : subst0 scrut C <> subst0 (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C).
  { subst scrut C. simpl.
    unfold subst0. simpl.
    unfold scons, ids. simpl.
    congruence. }
  apply Hneq. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        inversion H8; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H0 as [t'' Hstep_t]. exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H; subst; clear H.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H as [scrut' Hstep_scrut].
      exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof.
  intro H. apply H. apply progress.
Qed.

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  revert t.
  apply (fix IH (t : tm) : apply_sub (scons s ids) (rename (Nat.add 1) t) = t :=
    match t with
    | tVar x => _
    | tSort i => eq_refl
    | tPi A B => _
    | tLam A t0 => _
    | tApp t1 t2 => _
    | tFix A t0 => _
    | tInd I => eq_refl
    | tRoll I c args => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => _
    end).
  - unfold scons, ids. simpl. destruct x; auto.
  - simpl. rewrite (IH A). f_equal. apply (IH B).
  - simpl. rewrite (IH A). f_equal. apply (IH t0).
  - simpl. rewrite (IH t1), (IH t2). auto.
  - simpl. rewrite (IH A). f_equal. apply (IH t0).
  - simpl. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - simpl. rewrite (IH scrut). f_equal.
    apply (IH C).
    induction brs; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold shift1, shift.
  revert t.
  fix IH 1.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t0|t1 t2|A t0|I|I c args|I scrut C brs];
    simpl; auto; try reflexivity.
  - apply (f_equal (fun p => tPi (fst p) (snd p))).
    apply pair_equal_spec. split; simpl.
    + apply (IH A).
    + apply (IH B).
  - apply (f_equal2 tLam). apply (IH A). apply (IH t0).
  - rewrite (IH t1), (IH t2). auto.
  - apply (f_equal2 tFix). apply (IH A). apply (IH t0).
  - f_equal.
    induction args as [|a args' IHargs]; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHargs.
  - apply (f_equal2 (tCase I)). apply (IH scrut).
    apply (IH C).
    induction brs as [|b brs' IHbrs]; simpl; auto.
    f_equal. apply IH. apply IHbrs.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t, subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t. unfold subst0. apply shift1_subst0_inv.
Qed.
