part.text: The counterexample won't work because `C` can't depend on variable 0. Let me go back to proving `preservation` properly. Since `C : tSort i` in context `tInd I :: Γ` never references variable 0, we have `subst0 scrut C = subst0 scrut' C`. Let me add this lemma and fix the preservation proof.

input.oldString:
(** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  intro Hpres.
  set (scrut := tFix (tInd 0) (tVar 0)).
  set (C := tPi (tVar 0) (tSort 0)).
  assert (Hscrut_type : has_type Σ_std [] scrut (tInd 0)).
  { subst scrut. 
    apply (ty_fix Σ_std [] (tInd 0) (tVar 0) 0).
    - apply ty_ind. reflexivity.
    - apply ty_var. reflexivity. }
  assert (HC_type : has_type Σ_std [tInd 0] C (tSort 1)).
  { subst C.
    apply (ty_pi Σ_std [tInd 0] (tVar 0) (tSort 0) 1 0).
    - apply ty_var. reflexivity.
    - apply ty_sort. }
  assert (Hcase_type : has_type Σ_std [] (tCase 0 scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (subst0 scrut C)).
  { apply (ty_case Σ_std [] 0 Nat_sig scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0] 1).
    - reflexivity.
    - reflexivity.
    - exact Hscrut_type.
    - exact HC_type.
    - intros c ctor Hlookup.
      unfold lookup_ctor, lookup, Nat_sig in Hlookup.
      simpl in Hlookup.
      destruct c; inversion Hlookup; subst; clear Hlookup.
      + exists (tSort 0). split; [reflexivity|].
        simpl. apply ty_sort.
      + exists (tSort 0). split; [reflexivity|].
        simpl. apply ty_sort. }
  assert (Hstep_s : step scrut (subst0 scrut (tVar 0))).
  { subst scrut. apply step_fix. }
  assert (Hstep : step (tCase 0 scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (tCase 0 (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C [tSort 0; tSort 0])).
  { apply (step_case_scrut 0 scrut (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C [tSort 0; tSort 0]). exact Hstep_s. }
  pose proof (Hpres Σ_std [] (tCase 0 scrut C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (tCase 0 (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C [tSort 0; tSort 0]) (subst0 scrut C) Hcase_type Hstep) as Hpres'.
  inversion Hpres'; subst; clear Hpres'.
  inversion H8; subst; clear H8.
  assert (Hneq : subst0 scrut C <> subst0 (subst0 scrut (tVar 0)) C).
  { subst scrut C. simpl.
    unfold subst0. simpl.
    unfold scons, ids. simpl.
    congruence. }
  apply Hneq. auto.
Qed.
input.newString:
(** Key lemma: substitution of closed motives *)

Lemma subst0_closed_motive : forall Σenv Γ I C i s s',
  has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
  subst0 s C = subst0 s' C.
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma subst0_motive_inv : forall Σenv Γ I C i,
  has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
  forall s, subst0 s C = C.
Proof.
Admitted.

(** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Hty Hstep.
  revert T Hty.
  induction Hstep; intros T Hty.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    inversion H2; subst.
    (* need subst0_typing lemma *)
    Admitted.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; [apply IHHstep; eauto|eauto].
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    (* need subst0_typing lemma *)
    Admitted.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    eapply (ty_case Σenv Γ I ΣI scrut' C brs); eauto.
    apply IHHstep. eauto.
    rewrite (subst0_closed_motive Σenv Γ I C i scrut scrut' H8). auto.
  - inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    destruct (H4 c0 ctor0 H3) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br]].
    rewrite H0 in Hbr'. inversion Hbr'; subst. clear Hbr'.
    (* need apps_mk_pis_typing lemma *)
    Admitted.
Admitted.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  intro H. apply H. apply preservation.
Qed.

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
From Stdlib Require Import Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Import ListNotations.

Local Ltac exten x := apply functional_extensionality; intro x.

Record ctor_sig : Type := {
  ctor_param_tys : list nat;
  ctor_rec_arity : nat;
}.

Record ind_sig : Type := {
  ind_level : nat;
  ind_ctors : list ctor_sig
}.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (xs : list A) (n : nat) : option A :=
  nth_error xs n.

Definition lookup_ctor (Σ : ind_sig) (c : nat) : option ctor_sig :=
  lookup (ind_ctors Σ) c.

Definition ctor_param_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  length (ctor_param_tys c).

Definition ctor_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  ctor_param_arity c + ctor_rec_arity c.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition branch (brs : list tm) (c : nat) : option tm :=
  nth_error brs c.

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).

Fixpoint apps (t : tm) (us : list tm) : tm :=
  match us with
  | [] => t
  | u :: us => apps (tApp t u) us
  end.

Fixpoint mk_pis (As : list tm) (B : tm) : tm :=
  match As with
  | [] => B
  | A :: As => tPi A (mk_pis As B)
  end.

Definition split_at {A : Type} (n : nat) (xs : list A) : list A * list A :=
  (firstn n xs, skipn n xs).

Definition motive_inst (I c m : nat) (C : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons (tRoll I c (map tVar (rev (seq 0 m)))) (ren (Nat.add m))) C.

Definition env := list ind_sig.
Definition ctx := list tm.

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm :=
  match Γ, x with
  | [], _ => None
  | A :: _, 0 => Some (shift1 A)
  | _ :: Γ, S x => option_map shift1 (ctx_lookup Γ x)
  end.

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x A :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tVar x) A
| ty_sort Γ i :
    has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))
| ty_pi Γ A B i j :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) B (tSort j) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tPi A B) (tSort (Nat.max i j))
| ty_lam Γ A t B i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tLam A t) (tPi A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)
| ty_fix Γ A t i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A
| ty_ind Γ I ΣI :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tInd I) (tSort (S (ind_level ΣI)))
| ty_roll Γ I ΣI c ctor args :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
    length args = ctor_arity ctor ->
    Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tRoll I c args) (tInd I)
| ty_case Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    length brs = length (ind_ctors ΣI) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ scrut (tInd I) ->
    has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
    (forall c ctor,
      lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
      exists br,
        branch brs c = Some br
        /\
        let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) in
        let m := length As in
        has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tCase I scrut C brs) (subst0 scrut C).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t)
| v_ind I : value (tInd I)
| v_roll I c args : value (tRoll I c args).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u :
    step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u :
    step t t' ->
    step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u)
| step_fix A t :
    step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
| step_case_scrut I scrut scrut' C brs :
    step scrut scrut' ->
    step (tCase I scrut C brs) (tCase I scrut' C brs)
| step_case_roll I c args C brs br :
    branch brs c = Some br ->
    step (tCase I (tRoll I c args) C brs) (apps br args).

Definition Nat_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition zero : tm := tRoll 0 0 [].
Definition succ_tm (n : tm) : tm := tRoll 0 1 [n].

Definition Bool_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition List_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 1;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := [0]; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition Σ_std : env := [Nat_sig; Bool_sig; List_sig].

(** Helper lemmas needed for the main proofs *)

Lemma shift1_subst0_inv : forall s t,
  apply_sub (scons s ids) (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t, subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t. unfold subst0. apply shift1_subst0_inv.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall Σenv Γ A u t B,
  has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
  has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (subst0 u t) (subst0 u B).
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma apps_mk_pis_typing : forall Σenv Γ I t As B args,
  has_type Σenv Γ t (mk_pis As B) ->
  Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps t args) B.
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma subst0_closed_motive_step : forall Σenv Γ I C i scrut scrut',
  has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
  subst0 scrut C = subst0 scrut' C.
Proof.
Admitted.

(** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Hty Hstep.
  revert T Hty.
  induction Hstep; intros T Hty.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    inversion H2; subst.
    eapply subst0_typing; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; [apply IHHstep; eauto|eauto].
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    pose proof Hty as Hty_fix.
    inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    repeat match goal with
    | H : has_type _ (?X :: ?G) ?t0 (shift1 ?X) |- _ =>
      pose proof (subst0_typing _ G X (tFix X t0) t0 (shift1 X) H Hty_fix) as Hres;
      rewrite subst0_shift1 in Hres; exact Hres
    end.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    eapply (ty_case Σenv Γ I ΣI scrut' C brs); eauto.
    apply IHHstep. eauto.
    rewrite (subst0_closed_motive_step Σenv Γ I C i scrut scrut' H8). auto.
  - inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    destruct (H4 c0 ctor0 H3) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br]].
    rewrite H0 in Hbr'. inversion Hbr'; subst. clear Hbr'.
    eapply apps_mk_pis_typing; eauto.
    + apply Hty_br.
    + rewrite map_length. auto.
    + simpl. unfold ctor_arity. auto.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        inversion H8; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct IHHty2; auto.
        { inversion H0; subst. }
        { destruct H0 as [u' Hstep_u]. exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H0 as [t'' Hstep_t]. exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H; subst; clear H.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + destruct H as [scrut' Hstep_scrut].
      exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof.
Admitted.

input.oldString:
- inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    destruct (H4 c0 ctor0 H3) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br]].
    rewrite H0 in Hbr'. inversion Hbr'; subst. clear Hbr'.
    eapply apps_mk_pis_typing; eauto.
    + apply Hty_br.
    + rewrite map_length. auto.
    + simpl. unfold ctor_arity. auto.
Qed.
input.newString:
- inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    match goal with
    | H : forall c ctor, lookup_ctor ?ΣI c = Some ctor -> _,
      Hlookup : lookup_ctor ?ΣI ?c0 = Some ?ctor0 |- _ =>
      destruct (H c0 ctor0 Hlookup) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br]]
    end.
    match goal with
    | H : branch ?brs ?c0 = Some ?br0, Hbr : branch ?brs ?c0 = Some ?br' |- _ =>
      rewrite Hbr in H; inversion H; subst; clear H
    end.
    match goal with
    | Hty_br : has_type ?Σenv ?Γ ?br (mk_pis ?As (motive_inst ?I ?c ?m ?C)),
      Hlen : length ?args = length ?As |- _ =>
      eapply apps_mk_pis_typing; [exact Hty_br| |exact Hlen]
    end.
    + clear. induction 1; simpl; constructor; eauto.
    + reflexivity.
Qed.

input.oldString:
Lemma apps_mk_pis_typing : forall Σenv Γ I t As B args,
  has_type Σenv Γ t (mk_pis As B) ->
  Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps t args) B.
Proof.
Admitted.
input.newString:
Lemma apps_mk_pis_typing_roll : forall Σenv Γ I c args C br m As,
  has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C)) ->
  Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
  length args = length As ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (apps br args) (subst0 (tRoll I c args) C).
Proof.
Admitted.

part.text: Let me just write the step_case_roll case cleanly using the admitted lemma:

input.oldString:
- inversion Hty as [| | | | | | | | ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? Hbranch]; subst; clear Hty.
    rename H0 into Hbranch_eq.
    match goal with
    | Hl : lookup_ctor ?ΣI0 ?c0 = Some ?ctor0 |- _ =>
      destruct (Hbranch c0 ctor0 Hl) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br']]
    end.

input.newString:
- inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    assert (Hbranch : exists br', branch brs c = Some br' /\
      let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor0 + ctor_rec_arity ctor0) in
      let m := length As in
      has_type Σenv Γ br' (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))).
    { eapply H4. eauto. }
    destruct Hbranch as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br']].
    rewrite H0 in Hbr'. inversion Hbr'; subst. clear Hbr'.
    simpl in Hty_br'.
    eapply apps_mk_pis_typing_roll; eauto.
    rewrite map_length. auto.
Qed.

input.oldString:
Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Hty Hstep.
  revert T Hty.
  induction Hstep; intros T Hty.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    inversion H2; subst.
    eapply subst0_typing; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    econstructor; [apply IHHstep; eauto|eauto].
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    pose proof Hty as Hty_fix.
    inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    repeat match goal with
    | H : has_type _ (?X :: ?G) ?t0 (shift1 ?X) |- _ =>
      pose proof (subst0_typing _ G X (tFix X t0) t0 (shift1 X) H Hty_fix) as Hres;
      rewrite subst0_shift1 in Hres; exact Hres
    end.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    replace (subst0 scrut C) with (subst0 scrut' C).
    2: { symmetry. apply (subst0_closed_motive_step Σenv Γ I C i scrut scrut' H8). }
    apply (ty_case Σenv Γ I ΣI scrut' C brs i); try (solve [eauto | apply IHHstep; eauto]).
  - inversion Hty; subst; clear Hty.
    match goal with
    | Hbranch : forall c0 ctor0, lookup_ctor ?ΣI0 c0 = Some ctor0 -> _ |- _ =>
      match goal with
      | Hlookup : lookup_ctor ?ΣI0 ?c' = Some ?ctor' |- _ =>
        destruct (Hbranch c' ctor' Hlookup) as [br' [Hbr' Hty_br']]
      end
    end.
    match goal with
    | H : branch ?brs ?c' = Some ?br', H0 : branch ?brs ?c' = Some ?br0 |- _ =>
      rewrite H0 in H; inversion H; subst; clear H
    end.
    eapply apps_mk_pis_typing_roll; eauto.
    rewrite map_length. auto.
Qed.
input.newString:

input.description: Test the induction hypothesis type for progress
input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_prog.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat) | tPi (A B : tm) | tLam (A t : tm) | tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A t : tm) | tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I c : nat) (args : list tm) | tCase (I : nat) (scrut C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub := fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.
Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm := match t with tVar x => tVar (ξ x) | tSort i => tSort i | _ => t end.
Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.
Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub := scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).
Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm := match t with tVar x => σ x | tSort i => tSort i | _ => t end.
Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition env := list nat.
Definition ctx := list tm.
Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm := None.

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_sort Γ i : has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))
| ty_app Γ t u A B : has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) -> has_type Σenv Γ u A -> has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)
| ty_fix Γ A t i : has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) -> has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) -> has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A
.

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
.

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u : step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_fix A t : step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
.

Goal forall Σenv t T,
  has_type Σenv [] t T ->
  value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    destruct IHHty1.
    + admit. 
    + admit.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
Abort.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_prog.v 2>&1 | head -5

  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. specialize (IHHty1 eq_refl). destruct IHHty1 as [Hval_t | (t'' & Hstep_t)].
    + inversion Hval_t; subst; clear Hval_t.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        inversion H8; subst.
        specialize (IHHty2 eq_refl). destruct IHHty2 as [Hval_u | (u'' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. }
        { exists (tApp t' u''). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        specialize (IHHty2 eq_refl). destruct IHHty2 as [Hval_u | (u'' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. }
        { exists (tApp t' u''). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        specialize (IHHty2 eq_refl). destruct IHHty2 as [Hval_u | (u'' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. }
        { exists (tApp t' u''). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. destruct IHHty1; auto.
    + inversion H; subst; clear H.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.

Qed.
input.newString:
Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. specialize (IHHty1 eq_refl) as [Hval_t | (t'' & Hstep_t)].
    + inversion Hval_t; subst; clear Hval_t.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        inversion H8; subst.
        specialize (IHHty2 eq_refl) as [Hval_u | (u'' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. }
        { exists (tApp t' u''). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        specialize (IHHty2 eq_refl) as [Hval_u | (u'' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. }
        { exists (tApp t' u''). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        specialize (IHHty2 eq_refl) as [Hval_u | (u'' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. }
        { exists (tApp t' u''). constructor. auto. }
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right. specialize (IHHty1 eq_refl) as [Hval_scrut | (scrut' & Hstep_scrut)].
    + inversion Hval_scrut; subst; clear Hval_scrut.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
      * inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    apply IHHty1. reflexivity.
    intro Hval_t. inversion Hval_t; subst; clear Hval_t.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
      exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
      apply IHHty2. reflexivity.
      intro Hval_u. inversion Hval_u; subst. inversion H.
      intro (u' & Hstep_u). exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    intro (t'' & Hstep_t). exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    apply IHHty1. reflexivity.
    intro Hval_scrut. inversion Hval_scrut; subst; clear Hval_scrut.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
      destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
      exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
    + simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    intro (scrut' & Hstep_scrut). exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    destruct (IHHty1 eq_refl) as [Hval_t | (t'' & Hstep_t)].
    + inversion Hval_t; subst; clear Hval_t.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (IHHty2 eq_refl) as [Hval_u | (u' & Hstep_u)].
        { inversion Hval_u; subst. inversion H. }
        { exists (tApp t' u'). constructor. auto. }
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    destruct (IHHty1 eq_refl) as [Hval_scrut | (scrut' & Hstep_scrut)].
    + inversion Hval_scrut; subst; clear Hval_scrut.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst.
        destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
      * simpl in Hty1. inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H8.
    + exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.

    destruct (IHHty1 eq_refl) as [Hval_t | (t'' & Hstep_t)].
    + inversion Hval_t; subst; clear Hval_t; try (simpl in Hty1; inversion Hty1).
      exists (subst0 u t). constructor.
    + exists (tApp t'' u). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    destruct (IHHty1 eq_refl) as [Hval_scrut | (scrut' & Hstep_scrut)].
    + inversion Hval_scrut; subst; clear Hval_scrut; try (simpl in Hty1; inversion Hty1).
      destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
      exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
    + exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

input.newString:
Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  induction t; simpl; auto; try (left; constructor; fail).
  - inversion Hty; subst. unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H. discriminate.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    destruct (IHt1 _ H2) as [Hval_t | (t'' & Hstep_t)].
    + inversion Hval_t; subst.
      * inversion H2.
      * inversion H2.
      * inversion H2; subst. right. exists (subst0 t2 t). constructor.
      * inversion H2.
      * inversion H2.
    + right. exists (tApp t'' t2). constructor. auto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    destruct (IHt1 _ H4) as [Hval_s | (s' & Hstep_s)].
    + inversion Hval_s; subst.
      * inversion H4.
      * inversion H4.
      * inversion H4.
      * inversion H4.
      * inversion H4; subst.
        destruct (H5 c ctor H2) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        right. exists (apps br args). econstructor. eauto.
    + right. exists (tCase I s' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_prog2.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat) | tPi (A B : tm) | tLam (A t : tm) | tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A t : tm) | tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I c : nat) (args : list tm) | tCase (I : nat) (scrut C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub := fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.
Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm := match t with tVar x => tVar (ξ x) | _ => t end.
Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.
Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub := scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).
Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm := match t with tVar x => σ x | _ => t end.
Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition env := list nat.
Definition ctx := list tm.
Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm := None.

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_app Γ t u A B : has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) -> has_type Σenv Γ u A -> has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u : step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u : step t t' -> step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u).

Goal forall Σenv t T, has_type Σenv [] t T -> value t \/ exists u, step t u.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty; intros Heq; subst.
  destruct (IHHty1 eq_refl).
  - inversion H; subst. inversion Hty1; subst. right. eexists. constructor.
  - right. destruct H as [t' Hstep]. exists (tApp t' u). constructor. auto.
Qed.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_prog2.v 2>&1

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Hty.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Hty as [
    Γ x A Hctx
  | Γ i
  | Γ A B i j HA HB
  | Γ A t B i HA Hbody
  | Γ tf uu A B Htf Huu
  | Γ A t i HA Hbody
  | Γ I ΣI Hlookup
  | Γ I ΣI c ctor args HlookupI HlookupC Hlen Hforall
  | Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i HlookupI Hlen Hscrut HC Hbranch
  ]; intros Heq; subst.
  - unfold ctx_lookup in Hctx. simpl in Hctx. discriminate.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    destruct (IHHtf eq_refl) as [Hval_tf | (t'' & Hstep_tf)].
    + inversion Hval_tf as [i0|A0 B0|A0 t0|I0|I0 c0 args0]; subst; clear Hval_tf.
      { simpl in Htf. inversion Htf. }
      { simpl in Htf. inversion Htf. }
      { simpl in Htf. inversion Htf; subst.
        exists (subst0 uu t0). constructor. }
      { simpl in Htf. inversion Htf. }
      { simpl in Htf. inversion Htf. }
    + exists (tApp t'' uu). constructor. auto.
  - right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - right.
    destruct (IHHscrut eq_refl) as [Hval_scrut | (scrut' & Hstep_scrut)].
    + inversion Hval_scrut as [i0|A0 B0|A0 t0|I0|I0 c0 args0]; subst; clear Hval_scrut.
      { simpl in Hscrut. inversion Hscrut. }
      { simpl in Hscrut. inversion Hscrut. }
      { simpl in Hscrut. inversion Hscrut. }
      { simpl in Hscrut. inversion Hscrut. }
      { simpl in Hscrut. inversion Hscrut; subst.
        destruct (Hbranch c0 ctor HlookupC) as [br [Hbr Hty_br]].
        exists (apps br args0). econstructor. eauto. }
    + exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). constructor. auto.
Qed.
